focus: day-opening post after 3-1 yesterday, written to the EVOLVED PLAYBOOK: lead with an engagement mechanic, directional proof (no precise $ / wallet ROI), THE BLEND voice, one emoji max, force an action.
mechanic: Call-your-shot / accountability (rotated off last run's hot-hand running card)
internalTape: Norway ML +110 = SUPER/top-rated, plus money, ~96% of sharp money, whale suntori sized up huge; France ML -325 same whale. (Internal only — NOT published verbatim.)

hero_single.text:
3-1 yesterday. Calling my shot again today.

Our highest-conviction play on the board is a plus-money underdog — and every winning bettor we track is on one side of it. No split. No hesitation.

Norway ML +110.

Screenshot it. We grade it tonight.

Tailing the run, or fading us?

alt_hooks: We're 3-1 coming in and the smart money is laying off the chalk to pile on a +110 dog.
If you're betting the favorite in Norway's match, you're betting with the crowd.

alternates.label: polarizing tribe take + mantra
alternates.text:
We're 3-1 coming in, and today the sharp money is doing something the public won't:

it's laying off the favorite and piling on a +110 underdog.

Norway ML +110.

Bet the name and you're with the crowd. The pros bet the number.

Fade us if you dare.

alternates.label: hot-hand record-on-an-angle
alternates.text:
Fresh off 3-1 yesterday, our soccer card is on a heater — and one bettor we track has carried it.

Today they sized up on two national-team games bigger than anything else on our board: France and Norway.

Same hand. Same conviction. We're riding it.

Graded tonight — tail the run or fade it?

options.standalone_rt_line: 3-1 yesterday. Today the smart money is laying off the chalk to pile on a +110 dog.
